title: Xtra Sweet Japanese Tofu Shio Ramen
description: A sweet and savory Japanese ramen dish featuring marinated tofu and a rich shio broth, perfect for a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the shio broth mix and water to the pot, whisking to combine.
Bring the broth to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
While the broth is simmering, cook the ramen noodles according to the package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together the marinade ingredients and add the cubed tofu, letting it marinate for at least 5 minutes.
Add the marinated tofu to the broth and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
To serve, place some noodles in a bowl, ladle the hot broth and tofu over the top, and garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.
